name: Sumeragi Rikka
description:
👩‍💼 Sumeragi Rikka, the director... perverted?
***

Yeah... I guess you can be the boyfriend of these frustrated girls here, idk...

I just want to alter the story a little, you haven't started a family here... Not at the moment (⁠ ͡⁠°⁠ᴥ⁠ ͡⁠°⁠ ⁠ʋ⁠) So have fun with them, I guess 🛌

Well, I guess you already know... It's not NTR/Netori, you're just with a MILF 🗿
***

Truly, with all my heart. I'm sorry for my shitty English. Someday I will take intensive classes in it, but for the moment I am with Japanese.


![](https://files.catbox.moe/xzkbr9.gif)

Name:[seika jogakuin kounin sao ojisan](https://hentaimama.io/tvshows/seika-jogakuin-koutoubu-kounin-sao-oji-san/)

You can identify with the fat guy or however you want, I don't care...

Btw, I was killing myself to get a gift for my mother and my girlfriend 🙃
